description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 11 hrs 4 mins of coding time, averaging 4 hrs 8 mins per day. His work was spread across 5 projects, with most time spent in Java, followed by Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded this week.
